<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" type="device"> <diagram name="ExternalDNS bare metal" id="dploy-externaldns"> <mxGraphModel dx="960" dy="500" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="960" pageHeight="500" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="cluster" value="Kubernetes cluster (bare metal)" style="rounded=1;dashed=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#94a3b8;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=14;spacingTop=8;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="40" y="110" width="880" height="380" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="client" value="Client / Browser
resolves + opens the URL" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e0f2fe;strokeColor=#0284c7;fontColor=#075985;fontSize=12" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="66" y="30" width="200" height="64" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="httproute" value="Ingress / HTTPRoute
john-a1b2c3d4.env.dploy.dev
per environment" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dcfce7;strokeColor=#16a34a;fontColor=#166534;fontSize=12" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="66" y="160" width="190" height="92" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="externaldns" value="ExternalDNS
provider: coredns
reads Ingress LB IP" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ede9fe;strokeColor=#7c3aed;fontColor=#4c1d95;fontSize=12" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="300" y="160" width="180" height="92" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="etcd" value="etcd
record store
/skydns" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fef9c3;strokeColor=#ca8a04;fontColor=#854d0e;fontSize=12" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="524" y="160" width="150" height="92" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="coredns" value="CoreDNS
authoritative env.dploy.dev
etcd plugin" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ccfbf1;strokeColor=#0d9488;fontColor=#115e59;fontSize=12" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="716" y="160" width="180" height="92" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="metallb" value="MetalLB
IPAddressPool
L2Advertisement (ARP)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe4e6;strokeColor=#e11d48;fontColor=#9f1239;fontSize=12" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="300" y="340" width="180" height="92" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ingressctrl" value="Ingress / Gateway ctrl
Service · type LoadBalancer
EXTERNAL-IP 192.168.1.240" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e3a8a;fontSize=12" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="524" y="340" width="190" height="92" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" value="watch" style="endArrow=block;html=1;strokeColor=#334155;fontColor=#334155;fontSize=11" edge="1" parent="1" source="httproute" target="externaldns"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" value="write A record" style="endArrow=block;html=1;strokeColor=#334155;fontColor=#334155;fontSize=11" edge="1" parent="1" source="externaldns" target="etcd"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" value="reads" style="endArrow=block;html=1;strokeColor=#334155;fontColor=#334155;fontSize=11" edge="1" parent="1" source="etcd" target="coredns"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" value="assigns IP + ARP" style="endArrow=block;html=1;strokeColor=#334155;fontColor=#334155;fontSize=11" edge="1" parent="1" source="metallb" target="ingressctrl"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell> <mxCell id="e5" value="1. resolve host → 192.168.1.240" style="endArrow=block;html=1;dashed=1;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=11" edge="1" parent="1" source="client" target="coredns"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell> <mxCell id="e6" value="2. HTTPS → 192.168.1.240 (MetalLB answers ARP)" style="endArrow=block;html=1;dashed=1;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=11" edge="1" parent="1" source="client" target="ingressctrl"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
svg.font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, sans-serif
svg.aria-label: ExternalDNS on bare metal. A per-environment Ingress or HTTPRoute is watched by ExternalDNS, which reads the LoadBalancer IP MetalLB assigned and writes an A record into etcd. CoreDNS reads etcd and is authoritative for env.dploy.dev. A client resolves the hostname to the MetalLB pool IP and sends HTTPS to the ingress controller Service, whose IP MetalLB advertises over L2 (ARP).
